name: 29" Halifax Farmhouse Wood Barstool with Footrest Brown - Threshold™
description:
Evoke a charming farmhouse vibe with this Halifax Farmhouse Wood Barstool from Threshold™. Crafted from hardwood for long-lasting use, this farmhouse barstool sports a distressed finish for a touch of rustic allure, while a curved seat and footrest help you sit comfortably. Simple yet stylish, it makes a great addition to your home bar or kitchen counter.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
